name: Dijk en Waard (Netherlands)
description: A teal field bearing the municipal logo and the name 'DIJK EN WAARD'.
history: Flag of the municipality of Dijk en Waard in the province of North Holland, formed in 2022. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the municipal logo and wordmark 'DIJK EN WAARD'
